suppliers.dewu_desc: Aluminum Profiles · Fasteners · Electrical Components · CNC Machining · Metal 3D Printing
suppliers.dewu_additive_desc: Ultra-high precision SLM metal 3D printers. Precision 2-15μm, surface roughness Ra0.5-1.5μm, unsupported angle ≥10°. Targeting medical devices, aerospace, micro-channel heat exchangers, and semiconductor components.

about.description: GlbBus is an AI-powered B2B platform connecting global buyers with verified industrial manufacturers.
about.mission_text: To break down information barriers in global industrial procurement, using AI to precisely match supply and demand, making cross-border sourcing as simple and efficient as local purchasing.
about.vision_desc: GlbBus is a B2B industrial cross-border e-commerce AI platform covering the full chain — from product selection, content, operations, customer service to supply chain management. We partner with rigorously verified Chinese manufacturers through co-branded relationships to ensure product quality and delivery reliability.
about.team_text: Our team consists of experienced professionals in cross-border e-commerce, industrial manufacturing, and AI technology, with extensive operational experience across China, the US, Europe, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East.
about.why_1: Direct connection to verified manufacturers — no middlemen markups
about.why_2: AI-powered matching to find the right products faster
about.why_3: End-to-end management: sourcing → quoting → ordering → logistics → after-sales
about.why_4: Multi-language support covering major global markets
about.why_5: Rigorous quality control and on-time delivery guarantee

contact.description: Get in touch with our team.
contact.form_success: Message sent! We will get back to you soon.
contact.info_address: Address: Pudong New Area, Shanghai, China
contact.cta_text: If you have procurement needs or would like to become one of our supplier partners, feel free to contact us anytime.

meta.home_description: GlbBus is an AI-powered B2B platform connecting global buyers with verified industrial manufacturers. Source industrial products across China, Russia, and emerging markets.
meta.home_keywords: B2B, industrial sourcing, manufacturing, China suppliers, AI procurement, cross-border, industrial products, verified manufacturers

acceleration.hero_subtitle: Direct peering through Shanghai Internet Exchange (SHIXP). Stable, low-latency cross-border connectivity for your business.
acceleration.product_desc: Designed for scenarios demanding high-quality cross-border connectivity — academic collaboration, technical cooperation, multinational manufacturing, cross-border e-commerce, remote education, telemedicine, gaming services, cross-border settlement, and multinational enterprise data transmission. The service leverages SHIXP's direct peering with international Internet exchanges (IX) to deliver optimized routing and dedicated acceleration.
acceleration.feature_coverage_desc: A dedicated network spanning approximately 1,000km, covering 70% of Shanghai's data centers with point-to-point average latency under 1.15ms.
acceleration.feature_quality_desc: Flat IXP network architecture enabling direct interconnection (1-2 hops), end-to-end route optimization, significantly lower latency and higher stability than public internet.
acceleration.feature_bandwidth_desc: 10M~100G bandwidth options available, supporting large bandwidth customization.
acceleration.use_case_1: Cross-border e-commerce platforms (Amazon, eBay sellers needing stable access to dashboards and ads)
acceleration.use_case_2: Multinational enterprises requiring secure, reliable headquarters-branch connectivity
acceleration.use_case_3: Research & education institutions accessing international academic resources
acceleration.use_case_4: Gaming companies serving overseas players with low-latency connections
acceleration.use_case_5: Cross-border financial services and settlement platforms
acceleration.pricing_note: Extension segment fees quoted separately based on customer requirements.
acceleration.cta_desc: Tell us your requirements — destination, bandwidth, and use case. We'll provide a tailored solution within 24 hours.
acceleration.overview_slogan: Free your choice & Flex your connections
acceleration.overview_desc: Shanghai Internet Exchange (SHIXP) is one of China's national-level Internet exchanges approved by MIIT — one of only five nationwide, and the sole one in Shanghai. Established in December 2021, SHIXP operates as a neutral, open, fair, and trusted state-owned infrastructure. It is dedicated to powering the digital economy transformation and the national 'East Data West Computing' strategy under a micro-profit principle.
acceleration.ecosystem_subtitle: Direct peering with carriers, cloud providers and data centers — covering 16+ partners including China Telecom, China Mobile, China Unicom, Tencent, Alibaba, Huawei, GDS, 21Vianet and more
acceleration.digital_platform_intro: SHIXP's Digital Global Platform for cross-border enterprises provides one-stop cross-border network services:
acceleration.digital_feature_1: Unified console for managing all cross-border connections, bandwidth, and routing
acceleration.digital_feature_2: Real-time traffic monitoring and alerts with visualized network status
acceleration.digital_feature_3: Flexible bandwidth allocation enabling multi-site multi-point interconnection
acceleration.digital_feature_4: Enterprise-grade SLA guarantee with 7×24 operations support
acceleration.pl_basic_intro: Enterprise connectivity to the SHIXP network through physical/virtual ports:
acceleration.pl_interconnect: Interconnection Port — Direct peering between enterprises, ICPs, and ISPs
acceleration.pl_transit: Transit Port — One-point access connecting multiple operators
acceleration.pl_multicloud: Multi-Cloud Port — Pre-peered with major cloud providers for hybrid/multi-cloud
acceleration.pl_dedicated: Dedicated Port — Private data channels with high SLA guarantees (<1.15ms latency)
acceleration.pl_international: International Acceleration — Optimized cross-border access (Shanghai ↔ Japan/US/Europe/Singapore, 10M~100G)
acceleration.pl_compute: Compute Services — Nation's first compute power trading platform
acceleration.pl_security: Technical Services — Content acceleration, IPv6+ certification, security protection, network ITO
acceleration.value_cost: Cost: Comprehensive networking costs reduced by over 50%
